text: Moving from a shadowy, almost sterile corridor into a vibrant space dedicated to research and development, I feel an abrupt transition. The dim emptiness behind me contrasts sharply with the promise of discovery ahead. The presence of text reflecting on objects, intentionality, and the future encourages me to pause and ponder. The environment feels hopeful, as if inviting me to participate in the process of curiosity and growth. Here, I am both observer and thinker, aware of the systems around me, yet drawn to the potential embedded within these walls.
